name: plsda_raw
description: PLS-DA on preprocessed raw spectrum (987 bins). Project-headline baseline (LOSO file-weighted balanced acc = 0.603).

loso_headline.note: This is the *generalization* score under LOSO CV. The deployed joblib was refit on all 7,122 spectra, so it does NOT have a single LOSO number — use the cross-validated value as the operational expectation.
